info.name: AlgoTrading API Collection
info.description: REST API endpoints for Weekly Breakouts, IPOs, and US Market trading strategies

request.description: Seed previous week's high/low for all symbols. Equivalent to Monday 9:31 AM scheduler.
Manually trigger one daily scan cycle. Equivalent to 3:31 PM scheduler. Sends alerts to Investment_picks_bot.
View current weekly breakout state for all seeded symbols. Shows weeklyHigh, weeklyLow, prevDailyLow/High, and alert flags.
View only symbols still being watched (not yet alerted on both buy and sell sides).
View symbols that have already triggered at least one side (buy or sell) this week.
Fetches today's 52-week high stocks from NSE and sends CSV to Telegram. Runs automatically at 3:35 PM Friday.
Fetches today's 52-week low stocks from NSE and sends CSV to Telegram.
Sends both 52-week high and low CSVs to Telegram in one call.
Scans all NSE symbols for weekly close breakout (current weekly close > previous weekly high). Sends alerts to Investment_picks_bot.

Upload an NSE CSV (52-week highs format) and run weekly/daily filters against the uploaded symbols. Checks both weekly close breakout and daily breakout rules. Alerts go to Investment_picks_bot.

Usage: curl -F "file=@C:\path\to\52_week_highs.csv" http://localhost:8080/api/nse/upload-52-week
Debug endpoint to fetch weekly and current-week daily candles for a symbol. Returns exact candle data used for breakout calculations. Replace ACUTAAS with any NSE symbol.
Sync latest IPOs from ipoalerts.in into the database. Runs automatically at 8:00 AM daily.

Upload the NSE IPO CSV file — imports EQ-type IPOs only. Safe to re-upload same file (upsert by company name).

How to get the CSV:
NSE website → Market Data → IPO → Download (.csv)
URL: https://www.nseindia.com/market-data/all-upcoming-issues-ipo

Usage: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/ipo/upload-csv -F "file=@/path/to/ipo_list.csv"
Get all IPOs stored in database.
Get upcoming listings (listing date >= today). Sorted by listing date.
Send listing open performance alert for today's listings to Investment_picks_bot. Runs automatically at 9:30 AM on listing day.
Send EOD (end-of-day) performance alert for today's listings to Investment_picks_bot. Runs automatically at 3:35 PM on listing day.
Send upcoming listings summary (next 14 days) to Investment_picks_bot.
Scan past IPOs from the last 1 year for weekly breakout, reversal breakout, and breakdown signals. Alerts go to Investment_picks_bot.
Seed Finviz 52-week high list + Yahoo Finance weekly data for US stocks. Equivalent to Monday 6:00 AM IST scheduler.
Manually trigger one daily scan cycle. Fetches latest daily candle from Yahoo Finance for all tracked US tickers.
View current state for all seeded US tickers. Shows weeklyHigh, weeklyLow, buy/sell alert flags, and 52-week high flag.
View only US tickers still being watched (not yet alerted on both sides).
View US tickers that already triggered at least one side (buy or sell) this week.
View only US tickers sourced from the Finviz 52-week high list. These are the highest conviction BUY setups.
Test endpoint to manually sync IPOs.
Test endpoint to manually trigger all IPO alerts.
Manual trigger for the weekly F&O earnings summary (same as Monday 8:00 AM scheduler).
Send the full earnings window (PRE_EARNINGS next 10 days + POST_EARNINGS last 3 days) to Telegram. Saves snapshot used by /api/earnings-watchlist/diff.
Returns all active (PRE + POST) F&O stocks in the earnings observation window, sorted by result date.
Returns only PRE_EARNINGS stocks (result within next 10 days).
Returns only POST_EARNINGS stocks (result happened in last 3 days).
Manually trigger a full sync of the earnings watchlist (expire stale, transition phases, ingest new). Returns number of new entries added.

query.description: Optional. Set to true to also send the diff as a Telegram message.

request.description: Compares the current active earnings window against the last snapshot sent and returns toAdd/toRemove/unchanged. Add ?notify=true to also send the diff to Telegram.
Returns all 7 live watchlist categories.
Manually sends the consolidated live watchlist Telegram message.
Returns high open-interest stocks.
Returns live top gainers.
Returns live top losers.
Returns stocks sorted by traded value.
Returns stocks with unusual volume.
Returns only-buyer candidates.
Returns only-seller candidates.
Triggers morning market sentiment Telegram snapshot.
Triggers midday sentiment check.
Triggers pre-close sentiment alert.
Triggers end-of-day sentiment summary.
Checks PCR extremes and sends alert if needed.
Checks VIX spike and sends alert if needed.
Checks market breadth extremes and sends alert if needed.
Runs mover characteristics analysis. Date is optional; omit date to use today.
Scans all configured indices and sends Telegram index strength alert.
Manually triggers live Opening Candle Strategy scan and Telegram alerts.
Runs Opening Candle Strategy backtest across F&O stocks.
Returns stock backtest summary for date range.
Returns stock backtest trades. Optional filters: symbol, outcome.
Deletes stock backtest results for date range.
Runs strategy on NIFTY_50.
Runs strategy on BANK_NIFTY.
Runs strategy on FIN_NIFTY.
Runs strategy on all supported indexes.
Returns summary for one index. Use all for combined summaries.
Returns trades for one index.
Deletes index backtest results. Use all to clear all indexes.
Starts ORB backtest. Results are sent to Telegram.
Starts weekly breakout backtest. Results are sent to Telegram.
Uploads trading CSV for analytics.
Returns all daily trading summaries.
Returns daily trading summaries for a month.
Returns trading dashboard metrics for a month.
Uploads P&L CSV.
Starts Upstox OAuth login flow.
OAuth callback endpoint. Normally called by Upstox redirect.
Triggers SMS test endpoint.
Refreshes earnings table from NSE.
Sends global market cues to Telegram.
Sends sentiment alert to Telegram.
Runs daily earnings-related jobs manually.
Debugs week-ahead earnings target date.
Fetches earnings data and logs saved count.
Triggers week-ahead earnings alert.
Triggers day-ahead earnings alert.
Triggers today earnings alert.
Lists earnings events.
Lists today earnings events.
Lists upcoming earnings events.
Resets earnings alert flags.
Runs all test jobs.
Sends test Telegram message.
Triggers weekly earnings summary.
